market_pulse: Strong weekend activity across LIV properties with major talent bookings (Tiësto, Dom Bresky, Cloonee); competitors leveraging tech-forward content and wellness integration (OMNIA Daybreaker series), while newer venues (Omnia Dayclub, Palm Tree Beach Club) capturing early momentum with lifestyle positioning.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: LIV Nightclub has confirmed weekend roster (Cloonee Fri, Tiësto Sat, Dom Bresky Sun)

Sunday Circuit wellness program at LIV Beach gaining traction with integrated fitness angle
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Lean into EDC afterglow with targeted content around recovery/wellness Monday through Wednesday to extend weekend momentum into mid-week bookings.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub launching curated wellness experiences (Daybreaker series) combining fitness + music; LIV Beach Sunday Circuit exists but underrepresented in social storytelling vs competitors
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 TikTok/Reel series highlighting LIV Sunday Circuit participants (before/after fitness, testimonials) and position LIV Beach as 'recovery oasis' post-event

content_gaps.description: XS/Zouk/Hakkasan showing BTS staff content and prep videos; LIV social focuses on artist hype but minimal crew/preparation storytelling
content_gaps.suggested_action: Shoot 2-3 '24 Hours Before' BTS content showing LIV team setup, sound check, bar prep—humanizes the venue and builds anticipation

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club and OMNIA running giveaway campaigns; LIV social not promoting UGC contest mechanics on TikTok
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 2-week UGC contest: 'Best LIV Moment' with pool/VIP table prize; seed with LIV staff videos to show format
